chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6142 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on Misc. No.28243/2024 2. For orders on Misc. No.27225/2024 3. For hearing of main case 20.12.2024 Mr. Naveed Ahmed, advocate for the petitioner 1. Urgency granted. 2-3. On the last date of hearing learned counsel sought time to assist. Today he is present and states that his case is that a provision of the Income Tax Law is ultra vires. The learned counsel remained unable to demonstrate as to what impugned provision is ultra vires to. No case is made out to merit indulgence in the writ jurisdiction of this Court. Petition is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
